      |     [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  160 | [01;36m[K    // require that a failure to deinitialize still reset the memory so that[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  161 | [01;36m[K    // we can reclaim it?[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K      
  162 | [01;36m[K    if (Err) {[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~[m[K                 
  163 | [01;36m[K      for (auto &FA : Allocs)[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K  
  164 | [01;36m[K        FA.release();[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K          
  165 | [01;36m[K      OnDeallocated(std::move(Err));[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  166 | [01;36m[K      return;[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~~~~~~~[m[K                  
  167 | [01;36m[K    }[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~[m[K                          
  168 | 
      |                                
  169 | [01;36m[K    {[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~[m[K                          
  170 | [01;36m[K      std::lock_guard<std::mutex> Lock(Mutex);[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  171 | 
      |                                
  172 | [01;36m[K      for (auto &FA : Allocs) {[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  173 | [01;36m[K        ExecutorAddr Addr = FA.getAddress();[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  174 | [01;36m[K        ExecutorAddrDiff Size = UsedMemory[Addr];[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  175 | 
      |                                
  176 | [01;36m[K        UsedMemory.erase(Addr);[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  177 | [01;36m[K        AvailableMemory.insert(Addr, Addr + Size - 1, true);[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K
  178 | 
      |                                
  179 | [01;36m[K        FA.release();[m[K
      |         [01;36m[K~~~~~~~~~~~~~[m[K          
  180 | [01;36m[K      }[m[K
      |       [01;36m[K~[m[K                        
  181 | [01;36m[K    }[m[K
      |     [01;36m[K~[m[K

      |
